package rulecoverage

func NegativeSliceMembershipInLoopMapCandidate() string {
    ruleID := "slice_membership_in_loop_map_candidate"
    family := "hot_path"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "slices.Contains(...) or slices.Index(...) used inside loops against a stable-looking slice binding."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
